# WaterFlowKit firmware – GitHub Pages branch (gh-pages)

This branch hosts the public firmware artifacts and manifests for WaterFlowKit.
It is served via GitHub Pages and is intended to be consumed by:
- ESP Web Tools (browser-based flashing)
- OTA update integrations (using the JSON manifest)

## Do not edit manually
Files in this branch are generated by the CI workflow in the default branch.
Any manual changes will be overwritten on the next publish.

## Layout
- `waterflowkit-v1-wifi/`
- `waterflowkit-v1-wifi-cloud/`
- `waterflowkit-v2-wifi/`
- `waterflowkit-v2-wifi-cloud/`
- `waterflowkit-v2-ethernet/`
- `waterflowkit-v2-ethernet-cloud/`
- `*-manifest.json` aggregate manifests for OTA and ESP Web Tools
